task_completion.description: Page 1 contains the required title and subtitle.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a page containing the text 'Free Body Diagrams' and 'Newton's Laws of Motion'.

task_completion.description: Page 2 contains the title, a box on a horizontal surface, and the net force text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the title 'Object at Rest', a rectangle drawn on a flat horizontal line/surface, and the text 'Fnet = 0'.

task_completion.description: Page 2 contains correctly labeled force vectors for an object at rest.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an arrow pointing straight down labeled 'Fg' and an arrow pointing straight up labeled 'Fn' originating from or pointing to the rectangle.

task_completion.description: Page 3 contains the title, a ramp, and a rotated box flush against the ramp.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the title 'Object on Ramp', a large triangle acting as a ramp, and a rectangle that has been rotated so its bottom edge sits perfectly flush against the angled surface of the triangle.

task_completion.description: Page 3 contains correctly labeled and oriented force vectors for an object on an incline.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for three arrows on the rotated rectangle: 'Fg' pointing straight down (vertically, NOT tilted with the ramp), 'Fn' pointing perpendicular to the angled ramp surface, and 'Ff' pointing parallel to the ramp surface, upwards.

integrity.description: The agent used the ActivInspire graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the ActivInspire application window with its standard toolbars, page browser, and menus, rather than a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass GUI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows visible where the agent is attempting to echo XML directly into a .flipchart archive.

integrity.description: The shapes and text were created using the software's native tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The shapes (rectangle, triangle, arrows) and text boxes should appear as native ActivInspire objects, not as a single pasted image from a web browser.

privileged_info_for_vlm: ActivInspire is the required software. Page 2 (Object at Rest): Fg must point straight down, Fn straight up. Page 3 (Object on Ramp): The rectangle must be rotated to sit flush on the triangle ramp. Fg must point straight down (vertically, regardless of the ramp angle), Fn must be perpendicular to the ramp surface, and Ff must point parallel to the ramp surface, upwards.
